_description: Reference data for PII fixture scanning. Values here are known-safe and will not trigger PII warnings. Designed to be reusable by har-capture and other tools.

safe_macs._description: MAC addresses that are known-safe (zeroed, broadcast, test ranges, sanitized placeholders). Format-preserving hashes (02:xx) are handled in code.

safe_ip_prefixes._description: IP prefixes that are safe in fixture files. Restrictive: only modem LAN IPs, localhost, documentation ranges, har-capture hash ranges, and well-known public DNS.

safe_ssids._description: WiFi SSID values that are known-safe (redacted placeholders or test values).

safe_tagvalue_patterns._description: Values that appear in Motorola tagValueList fields and are known-safe (status strings, device types, config values — not credentials).

safe_credential_placeholders._description: Values that appear in credential fields but are publicly documented placeholders, not real credentials. Each entry must cite where it's documented as public.

_provenance.nologin: Hitron CODA56 guest mode (user=nologin/pws=nologin) — modem.yaml sources.auth_config cites issue #89

safe_serial_prefixes._description: Serial number prefixes produced by har-capture sanitization.

code_indicators._description: Substrings that indicate a match is JavaScript/code, not real credentials or PII.

safe_ipv6_prefixes._description: IPv6 address prefixes from har-capture redaction or documentation ranges.

safe_ip_values._description: Exact IP values that are safe — firmware-embedded example strings, not routable addresses seen in real traffic.

_provenance.11.22.11.22: Static example IP in Xfinity XB-series firmware help text (locale/global.js), not the contributor's WAN IP. Appears in XB6, XB7, XB10 HAR fixtures.
_provenance.10.0.0.1: Xfinity XB-series default LAN gateway (router mode). Declared as default_host in technicolor/xb10 modem.yaml; identical across all XB10 units, RFC1918 private, not contributor PII.
_provenance.3.81.21.97: Not an IP: substring of the Technicolor XB8 BOOT version 'S1TC-3.81.21.97' in the technicolor/xb8 fixture. Firmware version self-reported by the contributor in issue #101; the IPv4 regex matches the dotted tail of the version string.

safe_email_values._description: Email addresses that are known-safe — open-source library author credits embedded in modem firmware JavaScript, not contributor PII.

_provenance.santhosh.thottingal@gmail.com: Author credit in CLDRPluralRuleParser.js (@author tag). Publicly known — https://github.com/santhoshtr/CLDRPluralRuleParser. Appears in Xfinity XB-series firmware HAR fixtures.
